title: Guard installer against pnpm ignored build script warnings
acceptanceCriteria: Installer classifies ignored build script warnings deterministically instead of treating exit 0 as unconditional success.
Installer distinguishes warning-only healthy tsx/esbuild state from broken toolchain state with a repo-local post-install health check.
Installer guidance is based on the runtime pnpm capabilities used in the flow and never suggests unsupported commands.
Launcher/install flow no longer leaves raw ignored-build-script warning noise unsynchronized with installer UX when the warning is reproducible in the current code path.
Task bundle contains frozen spec, evidence, fresh verification, and task validate passes.
